reason: Successfully sent message to agent "QA-20260610-022837-803n", received response mentioning "4" for the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent home page with two agents listed in sidebar
Found agent "QA-20260610-022837-803n" in sidebar and verified status is "idle" — Agent status indicator confirmed as "idle"
Clicked on agent "QA-20260610-022837-803n" to open agent detail page — Successfully navigated to agent page with message input field ready
Clicked on message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully typed into input field
Clicked "Send message" button to send the message — Message sent successfully and agent started processing
Waited for and received response from agent — Agent responded with "4" (worked for 1s) and automatically created session "Basic Math Question Session"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly visible showing the number "4" as the agent's answer to the math question
